# 🎬 Video (245)

Generate cinematic clips from a text prompt, retime footage, or capture motion with nothing but a webcam. This is where AI stops describing the world and starts directing it, frame by frame.

It detects events like falls or abnormal activity, running entirely offline in the browser using TensorFlow.js.

- [doane2002cn/moontv-openclaw-skill](https://github.com/doane2002cn/moontv-openclaw-skill) — ⭐ 24 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This repository provides a skill for the OpenClaw agent framework that delivers daily movie and TV show information. - [Flyingpuppy25/FeiGe](https://github.com/Flyingpuppy25/FeiGe) — ⭐ 23 · `JavaScript` · Application — FeiGe is an AI-powered video analysis software that functions as a one-click tool for deconstructing films, advertisements, and short videos. It provides insights and analysis for video content.
- [oceanflowlab/TaRO](https://github.com/oceanflowlab/TaRO) — ⭐ 18 · `Python` · Paper Code — TaRO introduces Temporal-Aware Reasoning Optimization for video temporal grounding. - [NVlabs/4D-RGPT](https://github.com/NVlabs/4D-RGPT) — ⭐ 15 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository provides the code, model weights, and benchmark dataset for 4D-RGPT, a research project presented at CVPR 2026 that focuses on region-level 4D understanding through perceptual distillation.
- [oceanflowlab/OmniVTG](https://github.com/oceanflowlab/OmniVTG) — ⭐ 14 · `Python` · Paper Code — This repository introduces OmniVTG, a large-scale dataset and training paradigm for open-world video temporal grounding. It allows AI models to pinpoint specific video moments from text descriptions, using self-correction training and caption AI.
